message: Technology is selected after the process is understood.
note: Grouped by the business capability it serves, not by vendor. My deepest implementation specialisation is the Zoho ecosystem, but the architecture decision comes first and the product name comes second.

groups.name: Customer & CRM
groups.capability: Hold one reliable record of the customer, the pipeline and every commitment made to them.

groups.name: Operations & Custom Applications
groups.capability: Model operational work that no standard CRM object represents cleanly.

groups.name: Finance & Commerce
groups.capability: Keep one financial source of truth and let every other system reference it.

groups.name: Marketing & Communication
groups.capability: Reach the right segment through the channel the customer already uses.

groups.name: Automation & Integration
groups.capability: Move data between systems without a person retyping it.

groups.name: Analytics & Documents
groups.capability: Turn operational data into a report someone will actually open.

groups.name: Custom Front-Ends & Portals
groups.capability: Give external users a purpose-built surface when an internal application would not be appropriate.
